etymology.description: Phonetic: 戌(戌) (xū, "ninth month") + Semantic: 火(火) (huǒ, "fire") -> represents the sound 'huǐ' with the concept of fire
etymology.interpretation: The character 烕(烕) combines 戌(戌) (xū, "ninth month") as the phonetic component to convey the sound 'huǐ' and 火(火) (huǒ, "fire") to suggest a connection to fire, likely reflecting burning or destruction associated with a particular month or time.
